title: Fast Fiction Factory Source-Span Routing Review Pack
purpose: Focused local review pack for checking source spans, source references, routing targets, held defaults, and human-owned guardrails across the three deterministic adapter fixture outputs before freeform review or any model/API behavior.

fixture_class_gaps: missing or malformed source span payloads

human_owned_boundaries.guard: remain held until human author chooses a route
remain held until human author chooses a route

next_human_review_prompt: Review whether each representative source span is narrow enough, whether extracted values preserve the memo wording, whether routing targets are safe, and whether any fixture class is missing before freeform review moves to adapter changes.
